_comment: Manually-enriched labels for the 13 corpus issues, derived from issue titles to overlap with topical specialists' tag sets. Merged with live `gh issue view --json labels` output (deduped) by pick-specialists.cjs --labels-override. See feature-plans/curve-redo-specialist-followup-plan.md §'Findings from picker dry-run' (Option 2). Picker dry-run with these labels routes 13 issues across 10 distinct specialists; agent-92ff retains 1 (#649, cost-preview multi-chain — his strongest tag-overlap territory).
